title: The Hust Banhmi | Bánh Mì Bách Khoa
description:
The Hust Banhmi is the official sequel to Brother Hai's Pho Restaurant.

The Story ContinuesThe dust has settled in Dan Phuong after the infamous "Paradise" den was raided and dismantled. However, the story is far from over. The ringleaders have vanished into thin air, now appearing on the nation's most-wanted list. As a specialized police task force launches a high-stakes operation to hunt down these fugitives...

In an unrelated development ...You find yourself standing in front of the legendary Parabol Gate of HUST.

You have your own "special project": surviving university life as a student entrepreneur. Step into the shoes of a HUSTer and manage your very own Banhmi cart along with your buddy Mr. Gold at the heart of Hanoi’s most famous technical university.

Put on your uniform, prepare the ingredients, and get ready for a busy day of sales! May your Banhmi always be selling like hotcakes and your time at HUST be unforgettable!
description_short: The sequel to Brother Hai's Pho Restaurant! While a manhunt unfolds elsewhere, in an unrelated development, you're a HUST student selling Banh Mi at the legendary Parabol Gate. Manage your cart and keep the sales booming!
